evals.prompt: RFC 0012 is approved and merged. Our repo uses docs/rfc/ and ROADMAP.md plus TASK_TRACKING.md. What should change in the tree and tracking files?
evals.expected_output: Archive/move completed RFC per repo policy; update roadmap and tracker; clear stale In Progress; no contradictory status across files.

evals.prompt: I want to propose a notification bridge. No CONTRIBUTING file—only a docs/rfc/README that says 0001 started the numbering. What do you do first?
evals.expected_output: Read docs/rfc/README; pick next id; follow required sections; register in roadmap/tracker if the project uses them; avoid inventing policy without user confirmation.

evals.prompt: We use design/ instead of docs/rfc/ and Linear instead of TASK_TRACKING.md. How do you apply this skill?
evals.expected_output: Map skill pattern to design/ and Linear; discover numbering and status rules; do not force ROADMAP.md paths if repo uses equivalents.
